title: Mythos is Back, OpenAI Releases GPT 5.6, Apple’s Price Increases
summary: Weekly tech podcast discussion covering Anthropic's Mythos release, OpenAI's GPT-5.6 launch to limited users, government role in frontier model access, cost pressures on AI companies, billing transparency issues, and Apple's price increases.
writeup: Alex Kantrowitz and Ranjan Roy review a cluster of recent AI and tech developments, including Anthropic's Mythos model, OpenAI's GPT-5.6 release, and Apple's price increases. The discussion connects these releases to broader market dynamics: frontier model pricing strategies, government roles in AI access, and cost-effectiveness pressures across the industry. Billing transparency issues surface as a recurring concern alongside the pricing analysis. Underlying concepts include model evaluation, test-time compute, and enterprise AI.
